test_intent:
var exception = Assert.Throws<ArgumentException>(() => new Whiteboard("WB-001", -2.0, 1.5));
Assert.That(exception.ParamName, Is.EqualTo("width"));

var exception = Assert.Throws<ArgumentException>(() => new Whiteboard("WB-001", 2.0, -1.5));
Assert.That(exception.ParamName, Is.EqualTo("height"));

var exception = Assert.Throws<ArgumentException>(() => new Whiteboard(null, 2.0, 1.5));
Assert.That(exception.ParamName, Is.EqualTo("id"));

var exception = Assert.Throws<ArgumentException>(() => new Whiteboard("WB-001", 0.0, 1.5));
Assert.That(exception.ParamName, Is.EqualTo("width"));

var exception = Assert.Throws<ArgumentException>(() => new Whiteboard("WB-001", 2.0, 0.0));
Assert.That(exception.ParamName, Is.EqualTo("height"));
